# TypeScript API Reference

This section documents the public exports of the five PBVex TypeScript packages. Each page is generated from the package source by TypeDoc.

- [@pbvex/protocol](/api-reference/ts/protocol/) — Shared PBVex deployment protocol, wire value codec, and canonical hashing
- [pbvex](/api-reference/ts/pbvex/) — PBVex CLI and runtime authoring SDK
- [@pbvex/client](/api-reference/ts/client/) — Browser-neutral PBVex client with typed calls and realtime subscriptions
- [@pbvex/react](/api-reference/ts/react/) — React adapter for the PBVex SDK
- [@pbvex/svelte](/api-reference/ts/svelte/) — Svelte 5 rune utilities for reactive PBVex queries, mutations, and actions backed by @pbvex/client.
